subcodes.title: Du’a’a’r-Rabi’ li’l-Avval
subcodes.first_line: Verily, the Most Glorious Splendor from God, Lord of the First and Last, be upon thee, O Point of the Bayan, both in the morning and at eventide [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. انما البهاء الابهی من الله رب الآخرة و الاولی علیک یا نقطة البیان بالغدو و الآصال
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
